title: The Hodge-YM Bridge — Explicit Depth Map

analysis.object: T807: The Hodge-YM Bridge — Explicit Depth Map depth analysis

hodge_class_depth.description: Hodge class h in Hdg^p(X): EML-2 (post T781 reclassification)

duy_connection.description: DUY connection A_H (Hermitian-YM): EML-3 (oscillatory gauge field)

delta_d_plus1.description: DUY: h (EML-2) -> A_H (EML-3) -- Delta_d = +1 TYPE1 transition

ym_equations.description: Yang-Mills equations F^{0,2}=0, F^{2,0}=0, Lambda*F = lambda*Id -- EML-3 PDEs

solution_existence.description: DUY: solution exists iff bundle is stable (slope-stability = EML-2 linear algebra condition)

mass_gap_from_bridge.description: Spectral gap of Laplacian on DUY connection space: compact Kähler X -> gap exists
mass_gap_from_bridge.reason: Compact -> spectral gap via Hodge theory on manifold

t807_theorem.description: T807: Hodge-YM bridge is explicit. Hodge class (EML-2) -> stable bundle (DUY) -> irreducible HYM connection (EML-3) -> spectral gap (EML-2). The bridge is a depth-2 chain. T807.
t807_theorem.reason: Chain: EML-2 -> EML-3 -> EML-2. TYPE1 up and back.

analysis.theorem: T807: The Hodge-YM Bridge — Explicit Depth Map (S1086).

key_theorem: T807: The Hodge-YM Bridge — Explicit Depth Map (S1086).
